title: hydrocotyle elegans
intro: Hydrocotyle elegans, also known as Pennywort or Indian Pennywort, is a type of aquatic plant commonly found in tropical regions. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiviral effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as anxiety, stress, and cognitive impairment, due to its neuroprotective and adaptogenic properties. Hydrocotyle elegans can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts for use in traditional medicine, and it is also used in some modern supplements.
